prompt: Colorize only objects beyond 5m (black part in the reference).
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Colorize only the regions representing objects beyond 5 meters, as defined by the black areas in image 2. The foreground elements (corresponding to the white areas in image 2) should remain in their original black and white state.
objects: Black and white foreground of zebra crossing and street
